text:
Created attachment 212293
truss filezilla

FileZilla crashes with "Undefined symbol" on start.

$ filezilla

ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/bin/filezilla: Undefined symbol "_ZN8wxString8ms_cacheE@WXU_3.0"

I am running 12.1 and have installed filezilla using pkg.

I have attached the output of truss.
